title: Opening for Production Engineer at Siemens India

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Siemens India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Production Engineer looking for your next big career move? Siemens India in Surat offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Siemens India:
Siemens India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens India!
